transcript: Speaker A (Bhatura): छोले, हमारी जोड़ी लोगों को बहुत पसंद है। हम हमेशा साथ रहेंगे। [Chole, people love our pairing. We will always stay together.] Speaker B (Kulcha): छोले तुम अभी भी भटूरे के साथ हो? आई मीन उसे प्रॉपर इंग्लिश भी बोलनी नहीं आती। [Chole, are you still with Bhatura? I mean, he doesn't even know how to speak proper English.] Speaker C (Chole): वो ट्राई कर रहा है। [He is trying.] Speaker B (Kulcha): He will never be able to speak fluent English like me. [Two days later] Speaker C (Chole): कुलचा सही बोल रहा है। तुम्हारे साथ रहके मेरा इम्प्रेशन डाउन हो रहा है। आज से हमारा सब खत्म। [Kulcha is right. My impression is going down by staying with you. From today, everything is over between us.] Speaker D (Narrator): नहीं भटूरा, रोने से कुछ नहीं होगा। तुम्हें छोले को दिखाना पड़ेगा कि तुम भी इंग्लिश बोल सकते हो। [No Bhatura, crying won't help. You have to show Chole that you can also speak English.] Speaker A (Bhatura): रोज़ 15 मिनट एआई टीचर के साथ इंग्लिश बोलने की प्रैक्टिस की। ग्रामर सुधरा, प्रोनंसिएशन क्लियर हुआ और धीरे-धीरे कॉन्फिडेंस बढ़ गया। [Practiced speaking English with an AI teacher for 15 minutes daily. Grammar improved, pronunciation cleared up, and gradually confidence increased.] [Two weeks later] Speaker A (Bhatura): There was a time when someone rejected me because of my bad English. That was the turning point of my life. Today, I can speak confidently because I worked on myself. Speaker B (Kulcha): अरे भटूरा इंग्लिश में बोल रहा है? यह कैसे पॉसिबल है? [Oh, Bhatura is speaking in English? How is this possible?] Speaker C (Chole): मैंने भटूरे को छोड़कर बहुत बड़ी गलती की। [I made a huge mistake by leaving Bhatura.] Speaker A (Bhatura): अगर भटूरा इंग्लिश सीख सकता है तो आप भी ज़रूर सीख सकते हैं। आज ही MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो और सिर्फ ₹1 के ट्रायल में अपनी इंग्लिश स्पीकिंग जर्नी शुरू करो। कॉन्फिडेंस आता है तो रिस्पेक्ट अपने आप मिलती है। [If Bhatura can learn English, you can too. Download the MySivi app today and start your English speaking journey with just a ₹1 trial. When confidence comes, respect follows automatically.]
on_screen_text: HAMARI [OUR] KO BAHOT PASAND [LIKED A LOT] CHOLE I MEAN WO TRY [HE IS TRYING] TWO DAYS LATER..... RAHA [STAYING] DOWN HO RAHA [GOING DOWN] NAHI [NO] RONE SE [BY CRYING] HOGA [WILL HAPPEN] TUME [YOU] MySivi AI English Speaking App ROZ 15 MINUTE [DAILY 15 MINUTES] PRACTICE KI [PRACTICED] CLEAR HUA AUR [CLEARED AND] TWO WEEKS LATER THERE WAS A OF MY BAD THAT WAS THE TODAY I CAN ON MYSELF. ARE BHATURA [OH BHATURA] YE KAISE [HOW IS THIS] BADI GALTI KI [MADE A BIG MISTAKE] ENGLISH APP ₹1 SPEAKING JOURNEY APNE AAP MILTI [GETS AUTOMATICALLY]
summary: An animated skit featuring Indian food characters where Chole leaves Bhatura due to his poor English skills. Bhatura uses the MySivi AI English Speaking App to practice daily, eventually speaking fluent English and gaining respect. The ad promotes a 3-day premium trial of the app for just ₹1.
